title: How many constituencies can a candidate contest from? | TN Elections with The Hindu

In the 2001 Tamil Nadu Assembly elections, AIADMK supremo Jayalalithaa filed nominations from four seats and 
all four nominations were rejected. Protests erupted. The ruling government was accused of conspiracy.
And ten years later, the Supreme Court pulled up that leader sharply. That leader was AIADMK supremo Jayalalithaa. How many constituencies can a candidate legally contest from in India?

Else, the fans and analysts have always wanted to brothers play for one team.

description: A controversial run-out of Salman Ali Agha in the second ODI between Bangladesh and Pakistan has ignited social media debate. Agha, believing the ball dead, bent to retrieve it, only for Bangladesh skipper Mehidy Hasan Miraz to swiftly dislodge the bails. Despite Agha's strong knock, his dismissal triggered a Pakistan collapse, impacting the match's outcome.

description: Thousands of Chinese fishing boats formed unusual geometric patterns in the East China Sea, raising questions about potential military or strategic mobilization. This highlights the challenges in disentangling deeply embedded AI systems from defense operations.

title: Taylor Swift’s $2B news signals power future with Travis Kelce
description: Travis Kelce has confirmed he will return to the Kansas City Chiefs for another NFL season, signing a one year deal reportedly worth up to $15 million. The veteran tight end says his decision was driven by his continued love for football. Kelce also credited Taylor Swift’s passion for her craft as inspiration. With the couple expected to marry before training camp, both stars remain committed to thriving in their respective careers rather than slowing down.

title: Fact check: Is Travis Hunter paying $150K monthly to wife Leanna Lenee?
description: Travis Hunter, the Jacksonville Jaguars star player, and his wife, Leanna Lenee, have been married for less than a year and have already found themselves involved in a scandalous debate after rumors of the star player being cheated on by his newly wed wife sparked chaos. Amid this, a clip of Travis Hunter allegedly saying he has to pay her a massive amount monthly to her has sparked chaos.

title: Archana Puran Singh proud as son Aryamann nets four vs Pakistan, eyes EPL dream
description: Archana Puran Singh's son, Aryamann Sethi, opened up about his struggles with depression, anxiety, and bullying, which impacted his promising football career. Serious injuries ultimately ended his dream of playing professionally. He also shared experiences of racism and feeling like an outsider due to his parents' fame.
